title: Order Draft Handoff
description: AI v1 handoff contract from AI Advisor to Commerce Runtime for quote/cart/order draft creation or continuation.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05, TECH-05, and TECH-04. AI cannot create Official Order and must use Commerce Runtime for QuoteSnapshot, Order Draft, Customer Confirmation, payment, and order creation.

cart_id.description: Cart reference if already created by Commerce.

order_draft_id.description: Order Draft created or returned by Commerce.

commerce_handoff_status.description: Handoff status. Prefer enums/channel/handoff-status.yaml or TODO define AI-Commerce handoff enum.

customer_confirmation_required.description: Invariant: customer confirmation is required before official order.

ai_may_create_official_order.description: Invariant: AI must not create Official Order.
